_readme: Labeled eval expectations for the scan pipeline, run by scripts/scan-e2e.mjs against the deployed functions with the harness's IBS + GERD profile. falseLow rules are HARD failures: an expected-risky item rendering as 'low risk' (score < 37) is the app-deleting error class. Extend this file as real-world fixtures are added; keep expectations conservative so prompt/model swaps fail loudly, not flakily.

barcode._comment: KIND Breakfast Protein Peanut Butter — the real-world case that exposed speculative-driver inflation. Guarded at engine level by GOLDEN [accuracy] deno tests; this entry documents the expected band for any future live barcode eval leg.
